name: Peanut Butter Balls
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces chocolate candy bar (such as Hershey's), up to 8 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for Mixture 1 and roll into balls. Refrigerate until firm.
2. Melt the ingredients for Mixture 2 together.
3. Roll the cooled balls from Mixture 1 into the mixture in Mixture 2.
